listings.title: Eminence 15" Speaker for musical instrument amplifiers Pro Audio
listings.body: Manufacturer: The code "67" indicates the speaker was manufactured by Eminence Production Date: The code "15596" suggests the speaker was produced in the 15th week of 1996. Speaker Type: This sis a 15-inch speaker driver designed for use in musical instrument amplifiers or Pro audio speakers Condition: Clean, The paper is fully intact no tears, the metal has some scuff marks as shown. Tested: 6.0 Ohms on the multi-meter. The sound reproduction was clear and strong, and accurate. Item will be shipped in a designated 15" speaker cardboard carton/box with appropriate OEM foam and cardboard packing materials. Eminence 15596 67-8634 15" Speaker for musical instrument amplifiers Pro Audio Call or Text show contact info

listings.title: GARDEN TILLER/ WEEDER/ CULTIVATOR
listings.body: Antique weeder/ cultivator / tiller 43” tall, probably over 100 years old Excellent condition Well made, heavy duty, strong wooden handle Only for pickup in Bedford, NY 10506, northern Westchester County I do not ship Please see all photos Please see my other garden items, tap “see more from this seller “ Thanks
